src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the JHipster generated annotation to reflect the new framework version.
Remove unnecessary empty braces from the annotation definition to modernize code style.
Rename logger variable from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Update logger method calls to use the new variable name 'LOG'.
Use 'var' for local variable declaration of SpringApplication instance.
Use 'var' for local variable declaration of hostAddress.
Extract application name into a separate variable for cleaner logging statement.
Reformat Optional chain for protocol determination to improve readability.
Reformat Optional chain for contextPath determination to improve readability.
Update log message formatting to use the extracted applicationName variable.
Reformat string concatenation in @Pointcut annotations to align continuation lines with the opening parenthesis.
Reformat string concatenation in @Pointcut annotations for application package pointcut to align continuation lines.
Reformat logger.error call in development profile branch to place arguments on new lines aligned with the method call.
Reformat logger.error call in production profile branch to place arguments on new lines aligned with the method call.
Replace ternary operator with String.valueOf to handle null cause in production logging, avoiding potential issues with null string interpolation or explicit null checks.
Replace explicit Logger type declaration with var keyword for local variable type inference.
Add a nested Liquibase configuration class to ApplicationProperties to support async start settings.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase(); ... public static class Liquibase { private Boolean asyncStart = true; ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance to follow standard naming convention (static final LOG) and update usage.
Update logger method calls to use the new static LOG variable name.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable initialization.
Rename variable SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Remove unused imports related to GitProperties, BuildProperties, and KeyGenerator that are no longer used in the class.
Refactor import statements to use specific imports instead of wildcard imports for Spring Context annotations.
Remove unused fields gitProperties and buildProperties from the class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
private GitProperties gitProperties;
    private BuildProperties buildProperties;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use var keyword for local variable declaration to improve readability.
Reformat Ehcache configuration builder code for better readability.
Remove setter methods for GitProperties and BuildProperties that are no longer needed.
Remove the keyGenerator bean definition that relied on the removed GitProperties and BuildProperties.
Add imports for Spring Boot H2 Console auto-configuration properties to support conditional bean creation.
Enable H2ConsoleProperties configuration class to allow binding of H2 console properties.
Refactor logger instance to follow standard static final naming convention.
Update logger usage to match the new static final field name.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: LOG.debug("H2 database is available on port {}", port);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add conditional property check to ensure H2 TCP server bean is only created when H2 console is enabled.
Use var keyword for local variable declaration to improve code conciseness.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable in date time formatter configuration.
Remove the Hibernate5JakartaModule bean definition and its associated import from the Jackson configuration.
Add conditional logic to support synchronous Liquibase startup based on application properties.
Inject `ApplicationProperties` to access the new `asyncStart` configuration flag.
Update logger instance to use a static final constant instead of an instance field.
Update log statement to use the new static logger constant.
Add null/empty checks and string conversion for Liquibase contexts to prevent potential issues with empty collections.
Add null/empty checks and string conversion for Liquibase label filters to prevent potential issues with empty collections.
Add imports for `CollectionUtils` and `StringUtils` to support the new null-safety checks.
Remove unused import for `Profiles` class as it is no longer used.
Replace explicit type declarations with var for local variables to modernize the code style.
